postconditions: result == (next_present == false || (retain > 0 && head > retain && next_boundary <= head - retain && (previous_present == false || previous <= next_boundary)))
acceptance_criteria: A prune boundary is safe only when it is unset or moves monotonically to a block at or before head - retain, so retained blocks are not crossed.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core prune && cargo test -p ic-evm-core prune && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway pruned && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway get_receipt_returns
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core prune safety plus evm-core prune and gateway pruned/retained query adapter tests
